body: import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunnerParameters;
import org.junit.runner.RunWith;
import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunner;
import org.junit.Test;
import org.apache.commons.validator.routines.checkdigit.CUSIPCheckDigit;
import org.apache.commons.validator.routines.checkdigit.SedolCheckDigit;
import static org.evosuite.runtime.EvoAssertions.*;
import static org.junit.Assert.*;

translation: assert "Invalid Character[2,7] = '-1' out of range 0 to 35" in str(e.value)
assert str(e.value) == "Invalid Character[1,1] = '18' out of range 0 to 9"
assert str(e.value) == "Invalid Character[-,-,-] = '-' out of range 0 to 35"
